title: R@`elayah #7480
definition:
Reelaiah = "bearer of Jehovah"

 1) one who returned from exile with Zerubbabel
    1a) also 'Raamiah'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Reelaiah = "bearer of Jehovah"

 1) one who returned from exile with Zerubbabel
    1a) also 'Raamiah'

    NASB:  companion of Zerubbabel
